display_information.name: Job Apply
display_information.description: AI-powered job application agent — resumes, cover letters, interview prep, calendar, and application tracking, all from Slack.
display_information.long_description:
Job Apply lets you run the full application workflow without leaving Slack.

🤖 Agent Runs
  /apply — Generate tailored resume, ATS resume & cover letter
  /prep — Generate an interview prep reference card
  /runs — List your recent Drive run folders

📅 Calendar
  /cal-today — Show today's events
  /cal-week — Show events in the next 7 days
  /cal-add — Add a calendar event with reminders
  /cal-view — View full details of an event
  /cal-delete — Delete a calendar event (with confirmation)

📋 Application Tracker
  /tracker — Pipeline summary grouped by status
  /track-list — List applications (optional: filter by status)
  /track-view — View full details of an application
  /track-add — Add application (BrandFetch search, all fields)
  /track-update — Two-step edit: all fields pre-filled
  /track-note — Add a comment to an application
  /track-delete — Delete an application (with confirmation)

🔍 Lookup & Info
  /company — Search company info (logo, domain, description)
  /whoami — Show your account details
  /activity — Show your 10 most recent audit events

👤 Profile
  /profile-name — Update your display name
  /profile-email — Change your email (triggers re-verification)
  /profile-password — Change your password
  /profile-resume — Upload a new master resume (.docx)
  /profile-guide — Edit your profile & voice guide

🛠️ System
  /jobstatus — Check API health
  /help — Full command reference

:microscope: Test Runner (owner only)
  /run-tests   — Run test suite: unit | api | slack | all
  /test-status — Check if a test run is in progress

slash_commands.description: Generate a tailored resume, ATS resume & cover letter for a job posting
Generate an interview prep reference card for an upcoming round
List your recent agent run folders from Google Drive
Show today's calendar events
Show calendar events in the next 7 days
Add a calendar event with optional reminders and application link
View full details of a calendar event
Delete a calendar event (requires confirmation)
Show your application pipeline summary grouped by status
List your applications, optionally filtered by status
View full details of a specific application
Add a new application — BrandFetch company search, all fields
Two-step: select app then edit all fields pre-filled from current record
Add a comment or note to an application
Delete an application record (requires confirmation)
Search company info — name, domain, and description via BrandFetch
Show your account details, role, and verification status
Show your 10 most recent audit log events
Update your display name
Change your email address — sends a verification email to the new address
Change your account password
Instructions for uploading a new master resume (.docx) via DM
View and edit your profile & voice guide
Check service health — storage, email, Drive, Anthropic key, active model, API latency
Show the full Job Apply command reference
Run automated test suites and report results (owner only)
Check if a test run is currently in progress (owner only)
